label: Bullish
explanation: 7/10 is bullish from a 7-day headline keyword scan. Bullish drivers: Fresh U.S.-Iran Conflicts Could Extend Energy Rally: 2 Bargains Remain; Higher bar for corporate profit growth poses challenge for US stock market rally - Reuters. Bearish offsets: Update: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Rise as Inflation Drops for First Time in Six Years, Trump Reverses Plan to Impose Toll on Hormuz Cargo; Wall Street set for lower open as Iran tensions jolt sentiment; chip stocks fall - 1470 & 100.3 WMBD.

limitations: Headline-based keyword heuristic, not investment advice.
Not part of the mechanical default signal unless explicitly added later.
Free RSS feeds can be incomplete and delayed.
